hero.eyebrowLeft: ( GET SEEN. GET CONNECTED. GO GLOBAL. )

about.label: About
about.description: An international fashion showcase connecting models, designers, photographers, beauty creatives and model agencies with the industry leaders through runway, education, castings and professional networking.
about.audience: ( For Models ) · ( Model Agencies ) · ( Designers ) · ( Photographers ) · ( Makeup Artists ) · ( Hair Stylists ) · ( Brands ) · ( Fashion Leaders )

projects.label: Our projects
projects.titleLine1:
YOUR LIVE ACCESS
TO THE FASHION INDUSTRY
projects.subtitle: We create live fashion events where talents, brands and industry professionals meet in person, connect, collaborate and create new opportunities together.
projects.subtitleBold: Global Fashion Code is where visibility becomes connection, and connection becomes opportunity.

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.description: A curated network of agencies, media, beauty houses and sponsors — invited season by season.

apply.label: Application
apply.title: Join
apply.description: Submit your portfolio for consideration at the upcoming Global Fashion Code event. We review applications from all creative disciplines to shape the future of high fashion industries.
apply.sendError: Something went wrong — please try again.

consent.main: By submitting this application, I confirm that the information provided is accurate and I agree to the processing of my personal data in accordance with the
consent.mainSuffix: . I understand that my materials may be shared with agencies and partners, that participation may involve photography and media, and that a separate Media Release Agreement may be required.
consent.under18: If the applicant is under 18, I confirm I am the parent or legal guardian.
consent.marketing: I agree to receive news and updates from GFC. I can unsubscribe at any time.

contact.description: For applications, press, partnership and general enquiry — please use the channel that fits.
